message:
feat(discovery): add manifest normalization fallback and canonical export

Make offline discovery catalog resilient to stale interface hashes
and legacy manifest shapes with three-stage parsing fallback.

Discovery resilience (readiness.rs):
- Add parse_manifest_for_discovery() with two-stage parsing
  (strict then normalized)
- Add normalize_manifest_for_discovery() handling:
  - Legacy "messaging" archetype to "bidirectional" normalization
  - Automatic "streaming" archetype injection
  - Legacy "cursor" state model to "singleton_writer" conversion
  - Missing "requires_approval" field injection
  - Legacy "network" and "rate_limits" field removal
- Add manifest_declares_streaming() helper for feature detection
- Add discovered_connector_from_toml() TOML fallback parser
- Update DiscoveredConnector::from_manifest() with three-stage:
  1. Strict parsing 2. Normalized parsing 3. TOML fallback

Catalog (catalog.rs):
- Add caching for normalized manifests

Export tools (export_tools.rs):
- Add _info() variants accepting canonical OperationInfo directly
- Add export_operation_infos() for Vec<OperationInfo> export
- Refactor existing to_mcp/claude/openai_tool() to delegate via _info()
- Prepare foundation for serve-mcp to export canonical capabilities

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
